SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.title: The Cat Died
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.descr: Deal {MinDamage:diff()}-{MaxDamage:diff()} damage at random. If that enemy has no more HP than the upper limit, kill it outright.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_THE_CAT_DIED.doomK: Kills this way count as Doom kills.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE.d: Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. Whenever your [gold]Script[/gold] ends, draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.title: Fire Nova
SUNQIAN_UNIVERSE_CARD_FIRE_NOVA.descript: {IfUpgraded:show:On X random enemies including the target, respectively: "|}Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {BurningPower:diff()} [gold]Burning[/gold] to ALL enemies.{IfUpgraded:show:"|}
